package rulecoverage

func PositiveAdminOrDebugEndpointRegistrationMixedIntoPublicRouterSetup() string {
    ruleID := "admin_or_debug_endpoint_registration_mixed_into_public_router_setup"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Operational endpoints registered alongside public routes with no clear boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
